basic_details.job_title: UCSL ApprenticesRecruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Graduate, Technician, Trade Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) has released the official Graduate, Technician (Diploma), ITI Trade Apprentices Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026 at ucsl.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the UCSL Apprentices 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a qualification of ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology, or Diploma in Engineering/Technology can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 17-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years No maximum age limit is specified in the provided data. Age relaxation details are not provided.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology or Diploma in Engineering/Technology
qualification.details: Mechanical Engineering (Graduate): A Degree in Engineering or Technology granted by a Statutory University or Institution empowered by an Act of Parliament or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Electrical Engineering (Graduate): A Degree in Engineering or Technology granted by a Statutory University or Institution empowered by an Act of Parliament or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Mechanical Engineering (Diploma): A Diploma in Engineering or Technology granted by a State Council or Board of Technical Education or University or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Electrical Engineering (Diploma): A Diploma in Engineering or Technology granted by a State Council or Board of Technical Education or University or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. ITI Trade Apprentices: Pass in X standard. Pass in ITI in the concerned trade

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentices: Rs. 15,000 Per Month (Stipend & Meals allowance) Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: Rs. 13,200 Per Month (Stipend & Meals allowance) ITI Trade Apprentices: 12,600 Stipend, & Meals allowance

selection_process: Certificate Verification Merit/Reservation based selection Medical Fitness
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
